reason: Rule property / modifier, not a distinct governance concept.
systemImpact: Reintroducing defeasibility as a first-class concept would confuse rule-behavior metadata with concept identity, widen the runtime toward interpretive drift, and duplicate structure already carried by authored rule exception, priority, or override handling.
removalTestResult: The system retains rule validity, ordering, and authored override structure without a standalone defeasibility concept. Existing law-side structure and metadata already cover the proposed role.
